text:
Sara's Hair is a lock of hair from a well-known actress encased in a box that comes with a DNA certificate of authenticity. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 8, Chapter 70 

Background

Sara's hair is one of the requested items for the Nostrade bodyguard applicants to obtain. 

Plot

Yorknew City arc

Kurapika manages to acquire Sara's Hair, along with a DNA certificate of authenticity, which allows him to be hired as a bodyguard. 

Trivia

The character's name was omitted in the Viz translation of the manga; the only thing mentioned is "a lock of celebrity hair", but the celebrity's name is not disclosed. 

Anime and Manga Differences

The hair itself was only shown in the 2011 anime adaptation (and it's black). Hunter × Hunter - Episode 41 (2011) The manga and the 1999 anime adaptation Hunter × Hunter - Episode 50 (1999) just show the closed box in which the hair is kept.
